data.content:
exercise organization,routine design	Gym
Split
The Gym is a setting where the split method is employed, organizing workouts into different exercise sessions.

muscle targeting,workout schedule	Push
Split
Split is a method that includes push exercises to work on specific muscle groups.

muscle targeting,workout schedule	Pull
Split
Split is a method that includes pull exercises targeting particular muscles.

muscle targeting,workout schedule	Legs
Split
Split is a method that incorporates leg exercises focusing on the leg muscles.

educational requirement,submission process	Chase Balmer
MyCourses Assignment
Chase Balmer is tasked with submitting the wine-tasting notes to the MyCourses Assignment section.

origin,wine production	Ancient Peaks Cabernet Sauvignon
Paso Robles
Ancient Peaks Cabernet Sauvignon is produced in Paso Robles, California.

data.src_id: Bully Hill Vineyards Chardonnay Riesling Fusion
data.content:
origin,wine production	Bully Hill Vineyards Chardonnay Riesling Fusion
Finger Lakes
Bully Hill Vineyards Chardonnay Riesling Fusion originates from the Finger Lakes region.

vineyard production,wine origination	Ancient Peaks Cabernet Sauvignon
Santa Margarita Ranch
The Ancient Peaks Cabernet Sauvignon is made in Santa Margarita Ranch within Paso Robles.

tasting notes,wine pairing	Ancient Peaks Cabernet Sauvignon
Prosciutto
Ancient Peaks Cabernet Sauvignon was paired with prosciutto, mellowing the wine's acidic bite but not significantly elevating the pairing.

flavor enhancement,wine pairing	Ancient Peaks Cabernet Sauvignon
Parmesan
Ancient Peaks Cabernet Sauvignon was paired with Parmesan cheese, enhancing both the cheese's flavors and mellowing the wine's acidity.
